about.title: Crafting AI that actually ships.
about.bio5: focused on deploying high-impact, autonomous systems. I specialize in LLMs, RAG, and Agentic AI, turning experimental research into reliable, enterprise-ready software. Let's build the future of conversational automation together.
projects.title: Selected projects.
projects.multiagent.desc: Multi-agent system with RAG for search and generation of contextualized responses. Implements orchestration of specialized agents with augmented retrieval.
projects.discord.desc: Task bot for Discord with workflow automation. Manages tasks, notifications, and integration with communication channels.
projects.pets.desc: Platform for pet adoption and management. Complete system with registration, search, and connection between adopters and NGOs.
projects.todo.desc: Web task list application with intuitive interface. Task management with create, edit, and complete functionality.

experience.title: What I've shipped.
experience.ai.title: Enterprise AI Orchestration
experience.ai.desc: Architected multi-agent systems on IBM watsonx and event-driven automation pipelines (n8n), hyper-scaling operational efficiency across business units.
experience.conv.title: Global Conversational Systems
experience.conv.desc: Designed multilingual NLU architectures (English & Arabic) and advanced GenAI/RAG pipelines, enhancing intent recognition and dialogue fluidity.
experience.fs.title: Full-Stack & Real-Time Integration
experience.fs.desc: Engineered robust backend services and embeddable React widgets with real-time streaming and CRM integrations (Salesforce).
experience.infra.title: Scalable Multi-Cloud Infrastructure
experience.infra.desc: Deployed high-availability multi-cloud architectures (AWS, GCP, IBM Cloud, OpenShift/Kubernetes) for intensive AI workloads.
contact.subtitle: Whether it's a complex AI workflow, a production-grade LLM integration, or a conversational system — I'm always up for a good challenge.
